ab: Cima saw kisu?
Ci Tumay kaku.
Cima saw kisu?
U wawa ni Marang kaku, ci Tumay ku ngangan nu maku.
en: B: I’m Marang’s son, my name is Tumay.

ab: Cima saw kisu?
U micudaday ni Luuh kaku, ci Tumay ku ngangan nu maku,
en: B: I am a student of Luuh, my name is Tumay.

ab: Maan han saw ku ngangan nu misu?
Ci Tumay han ku ngangan nu maku.
Cima han saw ku ngangan ni ama isu.
Ci Marang han ku ngangan ni ama aku.
en: B: My dad’s name is Marang.

ab: Ci Kilang cira.
U vavainayan a kaka nu maku cira, ci Kilang han ku ngangan nira.
en: B: He’s my brother, his name is Kilang.

ab: Cima han saw ku ngangan nira?
Ci Kilang han ku ngangan nira.
Ci Valiyus han haw ku ngangan nira?
Hay! Ci Valiyus han ku ngangan nira.
Ci Valiyus haw ku ngangan nira?
Caay, ci Kilang ku ngangan nira.
Cima saw kira tamdaw?
Ci Panay cira, u vayi nu maku cira.
en: B: She’s Panay. she’s my aunt.

ab: Cima saw kira tamdaw?
U cavay nu maku cira, Ci Nakaw han ku ngangan nira.
ch: B:她是我的朋友，她的名字是Nakaw。
en: B:She’s my friend, her name is Nakaw.

ab: Pina tu saw ku mihcaan nu misu?
Muketep tu ku mihcaan nu maku.
Pina tu saw ku mihcaan nira?
Savaw tu tusa ku mihcaan nira.
Pina tu saw ku mihcaan ni ama nu misu?
en: A: How old is your father?

ab: Lima a pulu’ tu ku mihcaan ni ama aku.
en: B: My father is 50 years old.

ab: Papina saw kamu a malekaka?
en: A: How many brothers and sisters do you have?

ab: Cacay ku kaka tu vavainayan, cacay ku kaka tu vavahian, cacay ku sava tu vavainayan nu maku.
ch: B:我有一位哥哥， 一位姊姊，一位弟弟。
en: B: I have a brother, a sister and a younger brother.

ab: Sikaka haw kisu tu vavainayan?
en: A: Do you have a brother?

ab: Awaay ku vavainayan a kaka nu maku.
en: B: I don’t have a brother.

ab: Papina saw ku tamdaw nu luma’ namu?
en: A: How many people are in your family?

ab: Sasepat ku tamdaw nu luma’ niyam.
en: B: There are four of us in our family.

ab: Icuwa saw kisu a micudad?
I Hualien kaku a micudad.
